From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**Nicholas L'Estrange** may refer to:

* Sir [Nicholas L'Estrange (politician, born 1511)](/wiki/Nicholas_L%27Estrange_(politician,_born_1511) "Nicholas L'Estrange (politician, born 1511)") (1511–1580), English politician
* [Sir Nicholas L'Estrange, 1st Baronet](/wiki/Sir_Nicholas_L%27Estrange,_1st_Baronet "Sir Nicholas L'Estrange, 1st Baronet") (1604–1655), English collector of anecdotes
* [Sir Nicholas L'Estrange, 4th Baronet](/wiki/Sir_Nicholas_L%27Estrange,_4th_Baronet "Sir Nicholas L'Estrange, 4th Baronet") (1661–1724), English Tory politician
